TaskGroup.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise v1.0
TaskGroup.Description: Automated Daily Export of: 1. File Integrity Monitoring with Approval IDs and User 2. Security Configuration Management Test Results 3. Rule Settings

ScheduledCheckRuleTask.name: TE FIM EXPORTS FOR SPLUNK
ScheduledCheckRuleTask.Description: Runs "Daily FIM Export for Splunk" action

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise v1.0

ExecAction.name: Daily FIM Export for Splunk on UNIX
ExecAction.Description: ./tecommander.sh report -T "DCR" -t detailedchanges_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,currentVersionsOnly,false,displayUsers,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o /opt/teexports/FIM/DCRtest.csv -s <te console> -u <user> -p <password>

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0

ExecAction.cmdline: /usr/local/tripwire/tecommander/bin/tecommander.sh report -T "DCR" -t detailedchanges_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,currentVersionsOnly,false,displayUsers,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o /opt/teexports/FIM/DCRtest.csv -s %s -u tecommander -p Trip*8wire

ExecAction.name: Daily FIM Export for Splunk on Windows
ExecAction.Description: .\tecommander.cmd report -T "DCR" -t detailedchanges_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,currentVersionsOnly,false,displayUsers,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o c:\teexports\FIM\DC.csv -s %s -u $(TOOL_USER) -p $(TOOL_PASS)

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0

ExecAction.cmdline: "C:\Program Files\Tripwire\tecommander\bin\tecommander.cmd" report -T "DCR" -t detailedchanges_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,currentVersionsOnly,false,displayUsers,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o c:\teexports\FIM\DC.csv -s %s -u tecommander -p Trip*8wire

ScheduledCheckRuleTask.name: TE SCM EXPORTS FOR SPLUNK
ScheduledCheckRuleTask.Description: Runs "Daily SCM Export for Splunk" action

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise v1.0

ExecAction.name: Daily SCM Export for Splunk on UNIX
ExecAction.Description: ./tecommander.sh report -T "DTR" -t detailedtestresults_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,lastTestResultsOnly,true,displayActualTestResults,true,displayRemediation,false,displayWeights,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o /opt/teexports/SCM/DTRtest2.csv -s <TE Console> -u <user> -p <password>

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0

ExecAction.cmdline: /usr/local/tripwire/tecommander/bin/tecommander.sh report -T "DTR" -t detailedtestresults_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,lastTestResultsOnly,true,displayActualTestResults,true,displayRemediation,false,displayWeights,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o /opt/teexports/SCM/DTR.csv -s %s -u tecommander -p Trip*8wire

ExecAction.name: Daily SCM Export for Splunk on Windows
ExecAction.Description: .\tecommander.cmd" report -T "DTR" -t detailedtestresults_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,lastTestResultsOnly,true,displayActualTestResults,true,displayRemediation,false,displayWeights,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o c:\teexports\SCM\DTR.csv -s %s -u $(TOOL_USER) -p $(TOOL_PASS)

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0

ExecAction.cmdline: /usr/local/tripwire/tecommander/bin/tecommander.sh report -T "DTR" -t detailedtestresults_rpt -P BooleanCriterion,lastTestResultsOnly,true,displayActualTestResults,true,displayRemediation,false,displayWeights,true,displayCriteriaAtEnd,true:RelativeTimeRangeCriterion,1,day,"In the last 1 day" -F CSV -o /opt/teexports/SCM/DTR.csv -s %s -u tecommander -p Trip*8wire

ScheduledCheckRuleTask.name: TE SETTINGS EXPORTS FOR SPLUNK
ScheduledCheckRuleTask.Description: Runs "Daily Settings Export for Splunk" action

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise v1.0

ExecAction.name: Settings.xml Export for Splunk on UNIX

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0

ExecAction.name: Settings.xml Export for Splunk on Windows

Path.name: Splunk App for Tripwire Enterprise Actions v1.0
